name: Sagaing Region (Myanmar)

colors.symbolism: the upper band, echoing the national tricolour
the middle band — peace and the natural greenery
the lower band — courage and decisiveness

description: Regional flag of Sagaing Region: a horizontal tricolour of yellow over green over red echoing the Myanmar national flag, charged in the centre with the regional emblem.
history: Used by the Sagaing Region government as one of Myanmar's 14 first-level administrative subdivisions (seven regions and seven states, plus Naypyidaw Union Territory). Many regional and state flag designs follow a common pattern based on the national flag, charged with the regional seal.

features.symbolism: the regional flag echoes the Myanmar national tricolour (adopted 2010)
the regional emblem of Sagaing Region, charged in the centre of the tricolour
